\tzpentry{ID5909}{Dtheta Holonomy Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5909 introduces Dtheta Holonomy Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \oint d\theta = 2\pi \end{equation}
